description: Acuity Scheduling is an online appointment booking and scheduling service. Businesses use it to publish booking pages, manage calendars, and handle appointment-related workflows.
summary: Acuity Scheduling exposes one public developer integration surface on acuityscheduling.com: a REST HTTP Scheduling API at `https://acuityscheduling.com/api/v1`, authenticated either by HTTP Basic with Acuity-issued User ID + API Key or by OAuth2 bearer tokens from a registered Acuity OAuth app.
